export default abstract class ClientBase extends GoblEntity {

	public static readonly COL_CREATED_AT = 'client_created_at';
	public static readonly COL_UPDATED_AT = 'client_updated_at';
	public static readonly COL_VALID = 'client_valid';

	public singlePKValue():string {
		const id = this.id;
		if (id === undefined || id === null) {
			throw new Error('Cannot get single PK value for unsaved Client.');
		}
		return String(id);
	}
	public identifierColumns(): string[] {
		return [ ClientBase.COL_ID ];
	}
	get id(): string { return this._data[ClientBase.COL_ID]; }
	set id(nVal: string|number|null) { this._set(ClientBase.COL_ID, nVal); }

	set gender(nVal: string) { this._set(ClientBase.COL_GENDER, nVal); }

	set data(nVal: Record<string, unknown>) { this._set(ClientBase.COL_DATA, nVal); }

	set updated_at(nVal: string|number) { this._set(ClientBase.COL_UPDATED_AT, nVal); }

	get valid(): boolean { return this._data[ClientBase.COL_VALID]; }
	set valid(nVal: boolean) { this._set(ClientBase.COL_VALID, nVal); }
